cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Tumpa Das? Sir, I'm calling from Passport Seva Kendra.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Tumpa. What's this about? I'm a bit busy, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sorry to disturb you. I'm calling regarding your query on our website. You had submitted a query about the status of your passport application.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, right. Yeah, I did. What's the update? Can you please make it quick, I'm in a meeting.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, sir. Let me just check on that for you. Can you please confirm your ticket number so I can look into this further?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 48s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
